title: renggeria
intro: Renggeria is a genus of flowering plants in the family Asteraceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Renggeria include relief from coughs and congestion, and it is also used to treat fever and skin conditions. Renggeria can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
